name: Pineapple Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces crushed pineapple (drain and reserve juice)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. To prepare the crust, combine corn flake crumbs, 2 tablespoons granulated sugar, and oil in a mixing bowl. Press into the bottom of two 9-inch pie pans; set aside.
3. To prepare the filling, combine cream cheese, 1 cup granulated sugar, whipped egg whites, and vanilla extract.
4. Bake for 50 minutes. Let cool to room temperature on a rack.
5. Refrigerate several hours.
6. Meanwhile, to prepare the topping, add water to pineapple juice to make 1/2 cup. Mix remaining granulated sugar and cornstarch with reserved pineapple juice. Cook over low heat until thickened. Add pineapple and melted margarine; cook for an additional 2 minutes. Cool and spread on cheesecake.
